title: Doflamingo Accepts Law
description: Pages 11–15 focus on doflamingo accepts law, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Flevance Citizens, Corazon as the fall of Flevance and Law's escape into Doflamingo's orbit reveal how disease, war, and prejudice created his despair.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sorry. there's simply nothing we can do

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We don't have enough doctors here! Or blood for transfusions! Anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There must be a way to eliminate Amber lead from the body!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: The disease itself isn't even contagious! Why won't the govern- went report this fact!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Hang in there just a little longer! Dad's the best doctor in the country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I just know he'll make you better!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why is it so noisy outside?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh... that's a festival! You know Florence is always lively.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This particular surgery utilizes this blood vessel.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: brother, let's go to the festi- Val!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just for 30 minutes, okay? We've got a patient in right now.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law, let's go to the festival!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: See, law? There is no such thing as despair in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: for a 10 year old kid to go through something like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Of course his personality's gonna get fucked up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: My parents, my sister, everyone at the Academy... They all died...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Why does this idiot have the right to live!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I just have to keep my mouth shut, no one's gonna even find out... who cares if the world loses one more shithead?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: He... He broke the edict of blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: It's the skewer torture for him dasuyan!

summary: Doflamingo Accepts Law advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
